# . files

My personal dotfiles managed with [yadm](https://yadm.io). (⊙_☉)

## 🚀 Setup on a new machine

### 1. Install yadm

#### macOS (Homebrew)

```bash
brew install yadm
```

#### Linux (Debian/Ubuntu)

```bash
sudo apt install yadm # or your package manager
```

### 2. Clone dotfiles

```bash
yadm clone git@github.com:esnilara/dotfiles.git
```

### 3. Run bootstrap script

```bash
yadm bootstrap
```

### To Update dotfiles

```bash
yadm pull
```
